tail/spinor = N_fam/rank = C(Nariai): 48 c3^4 / 128 c3^4 = 3/8 -- one ratio, three names (forced by shared atom 16)
findings.detail: 48/128 = 3/8; 48 = N_fam*dim S+ (Omega_adm), 128 = rank*dim S+ (spinor), C = 3/8 = Q_geom(Nariai)

findings.finding: Bonse extremality: h(E8) = 30 is the LARGEST integer whose totatives > 1 are all prime; its totatives ARE the E8 exponents; the two largest members are 24 (Leech/Monster octave) and 30 (E8 Coxeter), both with phi = 8 = rank E8
findings.detail: members = [1, 2, 3, 4, 6, 8, 12, 18, 24, 30] (verified exhaustively to 199; >168 impossible since 49,121,169 block); totatives(30) = [1, 7, 11, 13, 17, 19, 23, 29]

findings.detail: 6 pi^5 = 1836.1181 vs 1836.1527 (18.8 ppm); identity 6 pi^5 = pi^4/phi0_tree exact: True; census p,q<=40, |k|<=6: 12727 expressions, hits in +-20ppm: ['6/1*pi^5']; log-uniform null expects 0.02 -> worth a v100 full run
